Bob Dylan with Tom Petty & The Heartbreakers
11 October 1987
National Exhibition Centre, Birmingham, England

2. Like A Rolling Stone [4:54.44]

4. Forever Young [6:56.21]

7. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight [4:50.59]
8. Tangled Up In Blue [6:06.20]
